name: Placental MSC extracellular vesicle knee osteoarthritis randomized trial
summary: Triple-blind placebo-controlled split-knee trial of intra-articular placental MSC-derived extracellular vesicles versus saline in grade 2 or 3 bilateral knee osteoarthritis.
population: Adults with bilateral grade 2 or 3 knee osteoarthritis

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Extracellular Vesicle and Secretome Therapies because they can show whether the intervention changes function, biomarkers, and safety in Adults with bilateral grade 2 or 3 knee osteoarthritis. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
